data.content:
This is an NUnit project on VSTest. Use the `--filter` option with `ClassName`:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "ClassName=Contoso.Reports.Tests.ReportExporterTests"
```

This filters by the fully qualified class name, running only the 2 tests in `ReportExporterTests` and skipping `ReportGeneratorTests`.
